calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-17-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Brenda Fields, CSR #7235.

Plaintiff Greg Martinez was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Jeffrey Dembicer, Jeffrey Dembicer, Trustee of the Jeffrey Dembicer 2006 Revocable Trust and The Jeffrey Dembicer 2006 Revocable Trust.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on April 14, 2011.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, October 17, 2011.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Greg Martinez, and against defendants Jeffrey Dembicer, Jeffrey Dembicer, Trustee of the Jeffrey Dembicer 2006 Revocable Trust and the Jeffrey Dembicer 2006 Revocable Trust, as follows:

Principal - $20,000.00.
Attorney Fees - $15,000.00.
Costs - $585.00.
Escrow - $16,000.00

Total - $51,350.00.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-17-2011 Assigned To Trial Court

Off Calendar Sep-29-2011 Off Calendar

MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Order to Show Cause to Self-represented Plaintiff for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is heard this day. Court ordered Plaintiff sanctioned $100.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is not re-set at this time due to the proximity of the Trial Date. Proceedings not reported. (610)
